requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to Belgian grids must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants up to 75 kVA and above connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above the thresholds defined by each member state. In Belgium, Elia (transmission system operator) applies C10/11 technical regulations for connection of generation to the high-voltage grid, and regional DSOs (Fluvius in Flanders/Brussels, ORES/RESA in Wallonia) apply their own low-voltage and medium-voltage grid-connection codes. Belgian grid is 230/400 V 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 接入比利时电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准。欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过各成员国规定阈值的发电模块设定了具有约束力的要求。在比利时，Elia（输电系统运营商）依据C10/11技术法规规范发电装置与高压电网的接入；区域配电运营商（弗兰德/布鲁塞尔的Fluvius，瓦隆的ORES/RESA）执行各自的低压和中压电网接入规程。比利时电网为230/400 V、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 接入比利時電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準。歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過各成員國規定閾值的發電模組設定了具有約束力的要求。在比利時，Elia（輸電系統運營商）依據C10/11技術法規規範發電裝置與高壓電網的接入；區域配電運營商（法蘭德斯/布魯塞爾的Fluvius，瓦隆的ORES/RESA）執行各自的低壓和中壓電網接入規程。比利時電網為230/400 V、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: Elia C10/11 — Technical regulations for connection of generating installations to the Elia high-voltage grid (Belgium)
Fluvius grid-connection codes for low-voltage and medium-voltage generation (Flanders/Brussels)

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 or Belgian DSO/Elia grid codes for EU market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory, and must satisfy Elia C10/11 and the applicable DSO grid code in the relevant Belgian region (Fluvius in Flanders/Brussels, ORES/RESA in Wallonia). The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements. Belgian DSOs may also require documentation in Dutch or French.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被欧盟市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2或比利时配电运营商/Elia电网规程的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足Elia C10/11及比利时相关区域配电运营商（弗兰德/布鲁塞尔Fluvius、瓦隆ORES/RESA）的电网规程。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631具有直接法律效力。主要技术差距包括电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重连延迟设置不同及通信协议要求不同。比利时配电运营商还可能要求提供荷语或法语文件。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被歐盟市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2或比利時配電運營商/Elia電網規程的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足Elia C10/11及比利時相關區域配電運營商（法蘭德斯/布魯塞爾Fluvius、瓦隆ORES/RESA）的電網規程。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631具有直接法律效力。主要技術差距包括電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重連延遲設置不同及通訊協議要求不同。比利時配電運營商還可能要求提供荷語或法語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive / relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law. Elia C10/11 and regional DSO codes (Fluvius, ORES/RESA) are mandatory for grid connection approval in Belgium.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules. The recommended classification has not changed in the 2023 edition.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Belgian or EU grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and satisfaction of Elia C10/11 and the applicable regional DSO grid code is required before connecting to the Belgian grid. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory early in the product development cycle and verify Dutch/French documentation requirements with the relevant DSO.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合比利时或欧盟并网要求。在接入比利时电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新测试，并满足Elia C10/11及适用区域配电运营商电网规程。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室，并向相关配电运营商确认荷语/法语文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合比利時或歐盟並網要求。在接入比利時電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新測試，並滿足Elia C10/11及適用區域配電運營商電網規程。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室，並向相關配電運營商確認荷語/法語文件要求。
